docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) WHATLEY, KIM

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROP SUBJ DISP $893.00 $446.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $446.50, JUDGMENT OF FOREFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS DECLARED FORFEITED. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FOREFITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
